subject: Trunks's Time Machine capsule-corp dome vehicle with a young fighter visible nearby
suspected_ip: Trunks' Time Machine (Dragon Ball Z / Dragon Ball Super)
description: A dome-shaped vehicle occupies the center of the frame — a rounded capsule-corp-style pod with mechanical detailing, colored in yellow and blue-gray tones. The dome has visible segmented panels and structural supports. A humanoid figure with blue or lavender hair, seen from roughly mid-shot, stands near the machine, appearing to interact with or observe it. The background is light and relatively plain, placing focus on the machine itself. The overall composition is narrative rather than action-focused.
foreground: Dome-shaped capsule-corp time machine pod in yellow and blue-gray tones with a humanoid figure nearby
